description:
Two defects in the ready subtree overlay (internal/issue/blocking.go buildSubtreeOverlay walk):

1. An OPEN epic whose subtree already has an in_progress/in_review descendant collapses to just the epic — the actionable open siblings (the live frontier) are hidden. The drill-in only triggers when the epic NODE is in_progress; bw start <child> never promotes the parent. Fix in the walk: drill past an open node that has any claimed descendant, and suppress that node's own listing.

2. A future-deferred epic acts as a display root and suppresses its open, unblocked children, so they vanish from the global ready frontier (scoped ready still shows them). Fix in the walk: drill past a future-deferred node so its open children surface.

Fix is display-layer only (no data mutation). Add regression tests.
title: Fix bw ready: surface frontier inside open epics with claimed children, and don't let a deferred parent hide open children
